author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Added an initial self-test suite for the oracle framework. Previously zero tests existed for the oracle utilities themselves. Now covers (21 tests total): ULP distance for f64/f32 (equal values, signed zeros, 1-ULP step, NaN, cross-sign for ±1, cross-sign symmetry, cross-sign monotonicity, near-zero noise floor), parse_f64_value (numeric, NaN string, Inf/-Inf/Infinity strings), and parse_complex_data (finite numbers, NaN in re, NaN in im, +/-Inf in re, mixed fields, single Object form). Closes the foundational gap flagged in this issue. Fixture loading / full comparison logic testing can be layered on later as the framework evolves.
